bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: RAG tension read from dead run.flux field instead of run.hidden.tension. Always returned default 40 instead of actual tension value.
Dead Souffle cost assignment (opt['cost']=1) in sequential pipeline step 4. Souffle system removed.
Dot notation dict access (entry.tag, entry.context_default) in configure_from_registry(). Fails silently in GDScript typed Dictionary. Changed to entry.get().
ClassDB.class_exists('MerlinOmniscient') always false for GDScript classes. Dead code branch with ResourceLoader fallback. Simplified to direct instantiation.

overall_assessment: All known bugs from the static analysis hunt are now resolved. 2 CRITICAL + 6 HIGH + 6 MEDIUM = 14 total bugs fixed across 4 cycles. Codebase is clean for feature development.
